response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with strong web/backend credentials and some D-language systems work, but the role requires modern C++ (or Rust) for geospatial routing pipelines. C++ exposure is limited to a brief NI LabWindows/CVI stint a decade ago, with no Rust experience and no evidence of working on routing tiles, navigation pipelines, or large-scale distributed map data systems. GIS hobby work is relevant in spirit but not in scale or tech stack.
strengths: GIS/geospatial domain interest via GISCollective and Green Map
Systems-leaning experience with DLang microservices at high request volumes
Broad full-stack background with strong testing discipline (TDD)
concerns: No modern C++ or Rust production experience in the last ~10 years
No exposure to routing tiles, navigation guidance, or map data pipelines
Distributed-systems fundamentals (fault tolerance, consistency) not demonstrated
